feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: System Time different in system.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In T-Code: STZAC we can see that System time is set to UST which we would likt to change to CET.

  • OS-Level Time Zone is set to CET.

Question:

  1. What is the impact if we change the Time Zone to CET using T-Code STZAC.
  2. Do this have any effect of the functionality.
  3. Do we need to restart the system.

Please check attached document.

entry.title: Can’t save siderbar layout in FBL1H
entry.content:
Hi , SAP expert

Issue: Fail to save siderbar layout in FBL1H

Please check below screen shots in this attachment & confirm 2 things

  1.  in manage siderbar layout, there is none existing even we choose /default already?
  2. Program fail to save those fields in siderbar layout

    Step1- run FBL1H with layout- /default

     

    Step2- Manage siderbar layout

     


     

     

    Question:
    Why in manage siderbar layout, there is none existing even we choose /default already.

    Step3 – change layout and add those fields to left

     

     

    Step 4-save, a flash showed but Nothing saved, when going back and click manage siderbar layout again, there is nothing saved.

entry.title: SXI_MONITOR - still awaiting acknowledgment
entry.content:
Hi,

I use SXI_MONITOR to check xml message status, there is a few Ack. Status with "Still Awaiting Acknowledgment".
What do I need to check further regarding this?

thank for help.

Regards

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Global Consistency Check Run
entry.content:
We are getting the recommendation for the scheduling of the consistency check runs is not in agreement with SAP's recommendations in the EWA report. We have scheduled the consistency check job in DB13 and in the logs showing as no consistencies found but still we are getting the recommendation. Below are all the details of recommendation and consistency check job which we scheduled.

Please help me other than SAP where we need to schedule the Global Consistency Check Run

Below is the recommendation we are getting in EWA report

 

 

We have scheduled the consistency check job in SAP level in DB13

 

Job log

entry.title: modify designation
entry.content:
Hello

i'm working on the course S45250 Consumption-Based Planning and Forecasting in SAP S/4HANA. In the chapter 6 exercice 5.

I must modify the quantity from a Purchase Requisition. When i try to do it, i have an error message which is :" 

No designation in FR. Complete the article."

I did some research and to complete the article. I  access to the basic data view 1.  But in the basic data view 1, it's impossible to modify the article designation

Does anybody knows how to do it?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Hierachy BoM with Supplier name for part
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP S4 HANA.

I am using CS12 for reviewing / downloading a multilevel BoM. In this BoM, i want to get another column for supplier for each part showing in the BoM. How to get a such a BoM?

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Failed to create Live Connection at SAP SAC to SAP HANA Cloud for FinOps
entry.content:
Fehler bei der Verifizierung einer Live Connection in SAC (eu20) auf eine SAP HANA Cloud (eu30).

Allow all IP addresses ist in der HANA Instanz gesetzt. Trotzdem scheitert das anlegen der Connection

Anleitung ist von SAP https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q0X_XF1QuAg

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor

Die Fehler-Meldung ist sehr unspezifisch.  

We couldn't connect to your HANA system. For more information, see our troubleshooting page.
Correlation ID: 8502223582444492b974251792547832

entry.title: PR for UNBW Material without valuation price
entry.content:
I tried to change something within a PR (purchasing requisition) for a non valuated material (UNBW). The MRP generated the PR with valuation price none which is correct as the material is non valuated.

The error message I receive is ME 083 (Enter Valuation price):

I changed the field control to avoid entering the valuation price like descriped here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/error-message-me083-enter-valuation-price/qaq-p/2493673

The result was the I did not see the fields valuaiton price etc. any more in the screen. This is not OK and no solution.

How can change a PR or create a PR for non valuated material without entering the valuation price?

Thanks in advance for any hint.

Best regards

Patrick

entry.title: Power BI connectivity to SAP
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are in the process of integrating Power BI with SAP; however, we are facing an issue while connecting to the SAP system. The error details are attached for reference. We would appreciate it if you could advise on any required documentation, configuration steps, or SAP Notes that should be followed to resolve this issue and enable a successful connection.

Regards,
Prateek Prajapati

entry.title: How to solve error message Enter Business Place Message No. J_1IG_MSGS020?
entry.content:
How to solve error message Enter Business Place Message No. J_1IG_MSGS020 when the posting is coming from an Idoc?

This is for an Indian company code, the business place has been activated, business place has been created, assigned to plants (it is required for business place value to be the same with plant value? I ask in one post) currently we have many plants to one business place setup. 

When posting directly in MIRO business place can manually inputted but when the invoice is created from Idoc the error message is encountered. There is also a substitution in place for line items, but it seems it is not being triggered. 

The issue is further being complicated the issue as there are some invoices that encountered the error message that was posted successfully, trying to replicate the issue is not possible for now so were unable to ask for the issue to be debugged to check the root cause. 

Thanks in Advance for the assistance.

entry.title: How to cleanup the bgrfc units
entry.content:
How to cleanup the bgrfc units:

Dear Tammy,

Thank you for your update.

Actually, we are currently performing the activity in the Quality system.

Please find the attached document for your reference, which contains the activity details before and after the cleanup activity. However, there are no changes observed in the table entries or table size after the cleanup.

entry.title: HANA NSE Buffersize per Server in Scale Out Environment
entry.content:
We use the NSE option in some of our SAP HANA databases. Most of them are set up as Scale Up databases.
But we also want to use this feature in our Scale Out systems. So we set up the buffer_cahce_cs max_size per with different values (depending on the size of nse relevant tables/columns/partitions located on the different servers). We didn't find an explizit info, that this parameter can be used in this way - starting with the SPS 08 documentation of parameters, it's explicit documentend. The docu of our version (SPS 07) has only mentioned an information if a perameter can not be set per server.

It seems to be no problem to set the parameter per server. We are confused about the statistics, we see in the view M_BUFFER_CACHE_STATISTICS. The value of "MAX_SIZE" is still the general value. "ALLOCATED_SIZE" and "USED_SIZE" seems to be reflect a change - which doesn't fit to our settings:

Server "U1"
Parameter MAX_SIZE:    90
Statistics - Max_size:     107.374.182.400
Statistics - Alloc_Size:     99.419.976.000
Statistcs - Used_Size:      96.343.946.496
Statistics - Hit_Ratio:       9,98

Server "U2"
Parameter MAX_SIZE:    15
Statistics - Max_size:     107.374.182.400
Statistics - Alloc_Size:      31.656.842.816

entry.title: Agents assistant in s/4 hana
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a lot agents' assistant for Ariba but what agents we have dedicated i S/4 Hana?

I found only one article: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/nexgen-ai-agents-for-sap-s4-hana/ba-p/13983394

but it does not give me any information about technical details or list of all agents for S/4

I try to check also this list: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/ai-catalog/

No resources there. Please help

 

Regards

entry.title: how can I use a cursor on an initially empty, growing table?
entry.content:
I want to walk thru an initially empty table that is filled while doing this. So I constantly add rows to that table while another cursor should catch up. If the catching up cursor reaches the end, the process should stop. Here s some pseudcode in case that wasn't clear: 

:MyTab is an empty table
:ResultTab is an empty table, that I want to walk
:currentValue is something I fetched, starts with a given value
DO {
  EXECUTE IMMEDIATE (something with :currentValue) INTO :MyTab
  /* I might get from 0 to whatever results. */
  Append :MyTab to :ResultTable
  Fetch next :currentValue from :ResultTable
} WHILE (:currentValue is NOT NULL)

 My Problem is: how can I do this? If I declare a cursor, I have to open it outside the loop on the empty table, and will get an invalid result. I tried to play with HOLD but that didnt work. Is it safe to use "$rowid$" here on :ResultTable and just increment?

How would you do it?

entry.title: HANAパラメータ設定
entry.content:
お世話になります。

HANA 2.0 SPS08 Rev89のHANAシステムにパラメータを削除したいのですが、設定後に再起動をするとパラメータが復活してしまいます。

こちらのパラメータの意味と削除する方法はどのようにすればいいのでしょうか？

パラメータ：singletenant = yes

 

よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: Q2C tests
entry.content:
--- Description ---

I intended to download SAP Q2C Benchmark components from the Software Center to conduct Q2C tests. However, it shows no data available after clicking the link. Could you please advise the possible causes?


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Search for benchmark, the download link of SAP Q2C Benchmark components is displayed.
  2. Click to download that item
  3. shows no data available 
  4.

entry.title: For restricting edit/create options for Ariba purchasing doc type in S4
entry.content:
We have Ariba PRs and POs with document type 'ARB' that gets copied in the S/4HANA. There is a requirement to restrict the creation and modification of Ariba-generated PRs and POs in S/4HANA. Most of the standard Fiori apps used for creation or changes of PRs/ POs have been restricted by the security team using authorization objects - M_BEST_BSA ; however, for the remaining four applications (listed below), the security team is unable to enforce restrictions due to the lack of authorization control at the document type level. Could you please suggest what can be done for the below apps so that changes to the document type 'ZAR' should be restricted.

App nameApp ID
Mass Changes to Purchase RequisitionsF2594
Mass Changes to Purchase OrdersF2593
Monitor Mass Changes – Purchase RequisitionsF4391
Monitor Mass Changes- Purchase orderF3332

entry.title: SQLMD: Cross Node Joins Analysis
entry.content:
When executing SQLMD for Cross Node Join analysis, the program needs an input file containing Tables and Nodes. 

How to generate this file using the data from HANA DB? Wherever I check in System tables/views, this field with Node information is marked as Internal Use only and always return empty result.

So, how to generate the file with Table & Node information required to execute SQLMD?

Thanks

entry.title: Table To Track Deletion Records for DD02L and VARI tables
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We are loading data from the DD02L and VARI table from S/4HANA to Datasphere. We can observe that in certain cases the data loaded in the target(Datasphere) is more than the data present in the source (S/4HANA) at a instance of time. The load is executing daily once. 

We assume that there was some record deletion in the source system between the time the data was loaded and the instance when we are checking in the source system. Please let us know where can we see these records from the source system to tally our data integration records.

Thanks

entry.title: the way of cerate index
entry.content: 我们想给acdocp新建一个索引，是否直接在hana studio中执行：1、添加索引：CREATE INDEX SAPHANADB.ACDOCP~AUFNR ON SAPHANADB.ACDOCP (MANDT, AUFNR);  即可？
